package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for prometheus_high_cardinality_labels: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Use low-cardinality labels like method, status_code, endpoint type instead of user IDs, paths, sessions
var httpRequestDurationSafe = prometheus.NewHistogramVec(prometheus.HistogramOpts{
    Name:    "http_request_duration_seconds_safe",
    Help:    "HTTP request duration",
}, []string{"method", "status_code"})

var httpRequestCountSafe = prometheus.NewCounterVec(prometheus.CounterOpts{
    Name: "http_requests_total_safe",
    Help: "Total HTTP requests",
}, []string{"method", "status_code"})

func init() {
    prometheus.MustRegister(httpRequestDurationSafe, httpRequestCountSafe)
}

type CasePrometheusHighCardinalityLabelsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePrometheusHighCardinalityLabelsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePrometheusHighCardinalityLabelsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePrometheusHighCardinalityLabelsModel
}

type CasePrometheusHighCardinalityLabelsService struct {
    repo *CasePrometheusHighCardinalityLabelsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePrometheusHighCardinalityLabelsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativePrometheusHighCardinalityLabels(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePrometheusHighCardinalityLabelsDTO) error {
    method := c.Request.Method
    statusCode := fmt.Sprintf("%d", http.StatusOK)

    httpRequestDurationSafe.WithLabelValues(method, statusCode).Observe(0.1)
    httpRequestCountSafe.WithLabelValues(method, statusCode).Inc()

    slog.InfoContext(ctx, "handled", "rule", "prometheus_high_cardinality_labels")
    prometheus_high_cardinality_labels_negative := map[string]int{"prometheus": 1, "high": 2, "cardinality": 3, "labels": 4}
    prometheus_high_cardinality_labels_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    prometheus_negative_0 := prometheus_high_cardinality_labels_negative["prometheus"] + len(input)
    _ = prometheus_negative_0
    high_negative_1 := prometheus_high_cardinality_labels_negative["high"] + len(input)
    _ = high_negative_1
    cardinality_negative_2 := prometheus_high_cardinality_labels_negative["cardinality"] + len(input)
    _ = cardinality_negative_2
    labels_negative_3 := prometheus_high_cardinality_labels_negative["labels"] + len(input)
    _ = labels_negative_3
    return nil
}
